keywords.note: categoryTokens = preserved full names; keywordTokens = inverted-index tokens (normalized phrases since E-class bug fix). If multi-word category names appear fragmented in keywordTokens, this is a regression of the E-class bug.

rules.name: Psychic Terror (Psychic)
rules.description: If one or more Neurotyrants from your army are on the battlefield when you unleash the Shadow in the Warp, subtract 1 from the Battle-shock test each enemy unit on the battlefield must take as a result.

rules.name: Node Lash (Psychic)
rules.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If the target is Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

rules.name: Shadow in the Warp
rules.description: If your Army Faction is **^^Tyranids^^**, once per battle, in脗聽either player芒聙聶s Command phase, if one or more units脗聽from your army with this ability are on the battlefield,脗聽you can unleash the Shadow in the Warp. When you脗聽do, each enemy unit on the battlefield must take a脗聽Battle-shock test. Each time an enemy unit takes脗聽such a Battle-shock test, if it is within 6" of one or脗聽more Synapse units from your army, subtract 1 from脗聽that test.

rules.name: Synaptic Relays
rules.description: In your Command phase, you can select up to two friendly Tyranids units within 18" of this model芒聙聶s unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, the selected units are always considered to be within Synapse Range of your army.

rules.name: Synapse
rules.description:
If your Army Faction is **^^Tyranids^^**, while a **^^Tyranids^^** unit from your army is within 6" of one or more脗聽friendly **^^Synapse^^** models, that **^^Tyranids^^** unit is said脗聽to be within Synapse Range of that model and of your脗聽army. While a **^^Tyranids^^** unit from脗聽your army is within脗聽Synapse Range of your army:

芒聳聽 Each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, take脗聽that test on 3D6 instead of 2D6.
芒聳聽 Each time a model in that unit makes a melee脗聽attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of脗聽that attack.

rules.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
rules.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

rules.name: Leader
rules.description:
While a Bodyguard unit contains a Leader, it is known as an Attached unit and, with the exception of rules that are triggered when units are destroyed (pg 12), it is treated as a single unit for all rules purposes. Each time an attack targets an Attached unit, until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, you must use the Toughness characteristic of the Bodyguard models in that unit, even if a Leader in that unit has a different Toughness characteristic. Each time an attack successfully wounds an Attached unit, that attack cannot be allocated to a Character model in that unit, even if that Character model has lost one or more wounds or has already had attacks allocated to it this phase. As soon as the last Bodyguard model in an Attached unit has been destroyed, any attacks made against that unit that have yet to be allocated can then be allocated to Character models in that unit.

Each time the last model in a Bodyguard unit is destroyed, each CHARACTER unit that is part of that Attached unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks.脗聽

Each time the last model in a CHARACTER unit that is attached to a Bodyguard unit is destroyed and there is not another CHARACTER unit attached, that Attached unit芒聙聶s Bodyguard unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks.脗聽

Each time a unit that is part of an Attached unit is destroyed, it does not have the keywords of any other units that make up that Attached unit (unless it has those keywords on its own datasheet) for the purposes of any rules that would be triggered when that unit is destroyed.

rules.name: Leader
rules.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Neurogaunts^^**
- **^^Tyrant Guard^^**
- **^^Zoanthropes^^**
